case_title: DUDUM, MANUEL vs. SMITH, G. WAYNE et al

WAYNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: GARAGE STORAGE SPACE AT THE PREMISES COMMONLY KNOWN AS, LEASE FORFEITED, 814 14TH STREET, S.F, CA.
